title: FILTER division by zero - BIND vs. VALUES
description:
Query 1:
SELECT DISTINCT ?X WHERE
{
    BIND (0 AS ?X)
    BIND (0 AS ?Y)
    FILTER(1/?X || 1/?Y)
}

Result 1:
0

Query 2:
SELECT DISTINCT ?X WHERE
{
    VALUES (?X ?Y) {(0 0)}
    FILTER(1/?X || 1/?Y)
}

Result 2:
Virtuoso 22012 Error SR084: Division by 0.

Firstly, these two queries should give the same result. And secondly, as far as I am concerned, the correct answer is empty result, because FILTER should survive an inside error and ERROR OR ERROR is ERROR which should be filtered out.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_division (id INT, value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_division (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 0.0, 0.0);
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_division WHERE (value1 != 0 OR value2 != 0);
CREATE TABLE test_values (id INT, val1 FLOAT, val2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_values (id, val1, val2) VALUES (1, 0.0, 0.0);
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_values WHERE (val1 != 0 OR val2 != 0);
key_bug_features: FILTER division by zero with BIND and VALUES
